# Mandatory CI checks for the quality-gate aggregator (#300).
#
# One check-run NAME per line (the `name:` of each job, which is what appears as
# the check on a PR). The gate FAILS if any of these is missing on the head
# commit (so a rename can't silently drop protection) or did not pass.
#
# Only jobs that run on EVERY pull_request belong here. Path-filtered jobs (e.g.
# "BATS (Ubuntu)", which runs only on .sh / tests/bats changes) are intentionally
# NOT listed — they may be legitimately absent — but the gate still requires them
# to pass when they DO run ("present must pass"). Comment/mention workflows
# (@claude, @codex/@agy) do not run on pull_request and are excluded.

# pr-branch-name.yml
Agent branches match the documented pattern

# powershell.yml
PSScriptAnalyzer

# pr-docs.yml
Skill structure check
YAML syntax check
Skill routing consistency
CHANGELOG entry required for feat/fix/perf
Intra-repo markdown links resolve
GitHub Actions workflow semantics

# pr-hooks.yml
pre-bash-guard + non-guard hooks behavior
Codex hooks resolve from git root

# pr-install-parity.yml
Install + capture file list (bash)
Install + capture file list (PowerShell)
Bash and PowerShell installs produce identical file lists

# pr-scripts-powershell.yml
Smoke install (PowerShell)

# pr-scripts-shell.yml
Validate filled example
Smoke install (bash)
Shell scripts + hooks must be valid
install -> update -> uninstall -> new-skill (no dry-run)

# pr-tooling.yml
Claude tooling validity
Codex tooling validity
Antigravity tooling validity
POSIX/Windows JSON variants must share the same key set

# pr-versioning.yml
Claude/Codex/Antigravity dogfood install policy
Claude plugin + marketplace manifests valid
CHANGELOG.md release metadata valid

# pr-dogfood-parity.yml
Dogfood content + mode parity (bash)
Dogfood content + mode parity (PowerShell)
